common.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

categories.heading: Support categories
categories.intro: Create and organize the categories users choose from when opening a support ticket.
categories.empty: No categories yet. Create one to get started.
categories.delete_confirm_named: Delete the category “{name}”? This can't be undone.
categories.delete_confirm_with_tickets: This category still has {count} ticket(s). Deleting it will also delete those tickets. Continue?

category_editor.field_slug_help: Used in the category's URL. Leave blank to generate it from the name.
category_editor.field_color_help: Hex color (e.g. #3b82f6) used for the category's badge.
category_editor.field_icon_help: A Font Awesome class, e.g. fas fa-life-ring.
category_editor.field_position_help: Categories are ordered by this value, lowest first.
category_editor.field_is_appeal_help: Tickets opened in this category are treated as ban appeals.
category_editor.error_save: Couldn't save the category. Please check the fields and try again.

appeal_bans.intro: Control which users are blocked from filing ban appeals.
appeal_bans.banned_empty: No users are currently banned from filing appeals.

rate_limits.heading: Rate limits
rate_limits.intro: Limit how often users can open support tickets and ban appeals.
rate_limits.max_general_per_window_help: How many general support tickets a user may open within the window below.
rate_limits.general_window_hours_help: The rolling time window, in hours, for the general ticket limit.
rate_limits.max_appeals_per_window_help: How many ban-appeal tickets a user may open within the appeal window.
rate_limits.appeal_window_days_help: The rolling time window, in days, for the appeal limit.
rate_limits.max_concurrent_appeals_help: How many appeal tickets a user may have open at the same time.

settings.notify_new_reply_label: Someone replies to my support ticket
settings.notify_new_ticket_label: A new support ticket is opened (staff)

index.empty_own: No tickets yet. Click "New ticket" to open one.

errors.upload_no_files: Upload returned no files. Please try again.
errors.load_ticket: Could not load this ticket. It may have been deleted, or you may not have permission to view it.
errors.delete_reply_forever: Could not permanently delete the reply.
errors.delete_ticket_forever: Could not permanently delete the ticket.
errors.empty_body: Please write your message before submitting.

compose.appeal_banned: You are not permitted to file appeals. Please contact the site owner via another channel.
compose.no_appeal_categories: No appeal categories are currently available.
compose.no_categories: No support categories have been set up yet. Please contact an admin.
compose.title: New support ticket
compose.choose_category: Choose a category to get started.
compose.choose_category_appeal: Choose an appeal category to get started.
compose.body_placeholder: Describe the issue in detail. Markdown is supported.
compose.subject_first: Please enter a subject for your ticket.
compose.discard_confirm: You have an unsubmitted ticket. Discard it?

show.title: Ticket
show.closed_notice: This ticket has been closed and cannot be replied to.
show.cannot_reply: You cannot reply to this ticket.

reply.internal_placeholder: Internal note (only staff will see this)…
reply.discard_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

confirm.delete_reply_forever: Permanently delete this reply? This cannot be undone.
confirm.soft_delete_reply: Soft-delete this reply? Staff can restore it later.
confirm.soft_delete_ticket: Soft-delete this ticket? It will be hidden from the index and from the ticket owner; staff can restore it.
confirm.delete_ticket_forever: Permanently delete this ticket and all its replies? This cannot be undone.

user_controls.toggle_failed: Could not update the appeal-ban status.

email.new_ticket_body: A new {type} was just opened by {name}:

api.assign_staff_only: Tickets can only be assigned to support staff.
api.ticket_soft_delete_first: A ticket must be soft-deleted before it can be permanently removed.
api.login_required_reply: You must be logged in to reply.
api.cannot_reply: You cannot reply to this ticket.
api.login_required_edit: You must be logged in to edit a reply.
api.no_permission_edit: You do not have permission to edit replies.
api.no_permission_delete: You do not have permission to delete replies.
api.reply_soft_delete_first: A reply must be soft-deleted before it can be permanently removed.

rate_limit.appeal_banned: You are not permitted to file appeals.
rate_limit.appeal_has_open: You already have an open appeal. Please wait for it to be resolved before filing another.
rate_limit.appeal_quota: You have already filed {count} appeal(s) in the past {days} days (limit: {limit}). Try again later.
rate_limit.general_quota: You have filed {count} tickets in the past {hours} hours (limit: {limit}). Please wait before filing another.
rate_limit.generic: Cannot create a ticket right now.
